title: Costa Coffee India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Costa Coffee India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!
